title: Shoreline
tagline: Modern reservation and guest management platform for restaurants.
description: Shoreline is a full-stack reservation and guest management platform for restaurants — real-time table availability, guest profiles with visit history, waitlist management, and a front-of-house dashboard built for service speed. Designed as a direct alternative to OpenTable and Resy at a fraction of the cost.
story: Built after watching one too many hosts struggle with an OpenTable iPad that couldn't tell them which tables were about to turn. Shoreline starts with the host stand experience and works outward from there.
journey: Shoreline came from a specific front-of-house frustration: reservation platforms are built around the diner experience, not the host's. The host needs to know table status, cover counts, and waitlist queue at a glance — Shoreline's dashboard was designed around that use case first. The guest profile layer came second, because remembering a returning guest's preferences is one of the highest-value things a front-of-house can do and almost none of the affordable tools support it.
forWho: Restaurant owners and front-of-house managers who need modern reservation and guest management without OpenTable's pricing or Resy's complexity.

detailedSpecs.architecture: Next.js App Router + TypeScript frontend. Supabase PostgreSQL + Realtime for live table and waitlist state. Stripe for subscription billing. TailwindCSS for the host dashboard UI.
detailedSpecs.dataFlow: Reservation created → table marked held → Supabase Realtime pushes update to host dashboard → guest seated → visit logged to guest profile → table released back to availability pool.
keyPatterns: Supabase Realtime for live table availability
Guest profile with full visit history
Waitlist queue with SMS notification hooks
Host dashboard designed for service-speed use
